hyperedges.label: Vehicle Damage Survey Session - Yellow Ashok Leyland Truck
hyperedges.notes: All 8 vehicle photos were captured on 2026-04-04 between 12:30 and 12:45, documenting a yellow Ashok Leyland commercial vehicle (VIN partial MB1H50LD2RFGC4..39, odometer 56864 km) with severe windshield damage, front bumper/grille damage, muddy undercarriage, clogged radiator, and multiple active dashboard warning lights

Ashok Leyland AVTR Dump Truck RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.31 PM.jpeg

properties.notes: Yellow Ashok Leyland AVTR heavy dump truck, registration plate RJ23GD1504 (Rajasthan), multi-axle (6 wheels visible at rear), grey tipper body, IRB sticker visible on windshield, photographed on unpaved road/site

nodes.label: Front Overview with Inspector – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.31 PM.jpeg

properties.notes: Full front view of yellow Ashok Leyland dump truck. Inspector/surveyor male standing to the left. Front bumper, grille, headlights visible. Minor road dust on bumper. No significant structural damage visible. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:26:47.

nodes.label: Front Closeup – Bumper and Grille – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.32 PM (1).jpeg

properties.notes: Close-up of front bumper area. Yellow front bumper shows surface rust/corrosion and minor abrasions at lower edges. Wire safety guards over headlights. Grille appears intact. Registration plate RJ23GD1504 clearly visible. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:27:16.

nodes.label: Right Side View – Tipper Body – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.32 PM.jpeg

properties.notes: Right side profile of truck. Grey tipper body raised/in use position visible. Yellow cab with dust and minor surface wear. Model badge reads '3335 TN' on cab door. Tires show heavy mud/dirt consistent with construction site use. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:27:01.

nodes.label: Front Left Quarter View – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.33 PM (1).jpeg

properties.notes: Front-left quarter view showing tipper body, cab, and front bumper. 'AVTR' model badge visible on door. Stickers on windshield include IRB logo. Bumper and lower panels show dirt/minor scratches consistent with heavy site use. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:27:50.

nodes.label: Windshield Closeup with Stickers – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.33 PM.jpeg

properties.notes: Close-up of windshield and cab roof. Windshield is heavily dirty/contaminated with dust and insect residue. Compliance/inspection stickers visible on passenger-side (IRB, circular blue sticker). Minor potential chips or cracks ambiguous due to heavy contamination. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:27:27.

nodes.label: Rear View – Tipper Tailgate – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.34 PM (1).jpeg

properties.notes: Rear view of tipper body. Heavy rust and paint wear across entire rear panel of grey tipper body. Ashok Leyland logo painted in blue/white on tailgate. STOP sticker on left side. Registration painted 'RJ23GD 1504' on tailgate and separate plate below. Dual rear axle tires visible, showing significant road wear. Rust indicates extended service life. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:28:17.

nodes.label: Rear Left Quarter View – Tipper Body – RJ23GD1504
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.34 PM (2).jpeg

properties.notes: Rear-left quarter view of tipper body. Grey tipper sides show rust and wear along lower edges and corners. STOP sticker visible. Registration 'RJ23GD 1504' painted on rear panel. Dual tandem rear axles with dual tires. Cab visible in background showing yellow color in good condition compared to tipper body. A white SUV partially visible in background. Timestamp 04.04.2026 12:28:29.

nodes.label: Vehicle Survey Session – 04 April 2026
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.31 PM.jpeg

properties.notes: All 7 images captured within approximately 2 minutes on 04 April 2026 between 12:26:47 and 12:28:29, consistent with a structured vehicle inspection/survey walkround of a single vehicle.

nodes.label: Cracked Windshield - Interior View
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.35 PM (1).jpeg

properties.notes: Extensive spider-web crack pattern covering majority of windshield, photographed from inside the cab looking outward at a rural road with power lines visible

nodes.label: Vehicle VIN / Chassis Number Plate
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.35 PM.jpeg

properties.vehicle_type: commercial vehicle (Ashok Leyland based on ASH label)
properties.notes: Close-up of stamped chassis VIN plate with two large bolts; partial VIN readable as MB1H50LD2RFGC4..39; manufacturer label shows ASH (Ashok Leyland) and type approval AA0N

nodes.label: Front Bumper and Headlights - Damage
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.36 PM (1).jpeg

properties.damage_type: dent, corrosion, paint damage, deformed grille guard
properties.notes: Yellow vehicle front showing dual round headlights behind metal grille guard; left side of bumper shows denting and paint loss; grille guard visibly deformed; heavy dirt/mud accumulation; 3M tape visible on bumper

nodes.label: Cracked Windshield - Exterior View
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.36 PM (2).jpeg

properties.notes: Exterior view of severely cracked windshield with spider-web fracture pattern concentrated on lower-left region; entire glass pane cracked; wiper arm visible at top; orange/yellow cab roof

nodes.label: Vehicle Dashboard Odometer Display
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.36 PM.jpeg

properties.warning_indicators: multiple warning lights active (3 thumb-down icons)
properties.notes: Orange-tinted digital instrument cluster showing 56864 km odometer; 3 active warning/fault indicators; AdBlue low warning; fuel gauge near empty; date 04-04-26 time 12:31 PM

nodes.label: Vehicle Undercarriage and Front Skid Plate
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.37 PM (1).jpeg

properties.part: undercarriage, skid plate, front bumper underside
properties.damage_type: heavy mud/dirt accumulation, corrosion, possible impact damage to skid plate
properties.notes: Low-angle shot showing yellow vehicle underside; perforated skid plate heavily mud-caked; visible front tire; bumper underside with white tape; no obvious catastrophic structural damage but heavy soiling and corrosion

nodes.label: Accident Scene - Concrete Bridge/Retaining Wall
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.37 PM (2).jpeg

properties.structure: large concrete retaining wall / bridge abutment
properties.notes: Outdoor scene showing a large precast-concrete block retaining wall or bridge structure; dark coal or mud material at base; rural/open land with trees; likely photographed as part of accident scene documentation to show collision context

nodes.label: Radiator / Intercooler - Damage and Dirt
nodes.source_file: photosheetsforreview_extracted/images/WhatsApp Unknown 2026-04-16 at 1.25.41 PM/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-16 at 1.25.37 PM.jpeg

properties.damage_type: heavy clogging with mud/debris, possible fin damage
properties.notes: Close-up of vehicle front showing heat exchanger (radiator/intercooler) fins densely packed with dried mud and debris; corrugated hose visible; yellow bodywork surrounds; severe airflow obstruction likely

properties.description: A document icon with folded top-right corner and horizontal text lines, representing a generic file
A circular globe icon with longitude and latitude lines, representing the web or internet
The official Next.js wordmark spelling out NEXT.JS in black, used to identify the Next.js React framework
The Vercel logo: a solid white upward-pointing triangle, the trademark symbol for Vercel deployment platform
A browser or application window icon with a title bar containing three circular traffic-light dots, representing a desktop or browser window

properties.notes: Consolidated entity representing the subject yellow vehicle appearing across multiple survey images; identified as Ashok Leyland based on VIN prefix MB1 and ASH label on plate
The public/ SVG assets (next.svg, vercel.svg, file.svg, globe.svg, window.svg) are standard Next.js starter template assets indicating a Next.js app deployed on Vercel
